ddls:
CREATE TABLE "casinos" (
  "casino_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each casino */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the casino */,
  "casino_name" TEXT /* Name of the casino */,
  "bonus" TEXT /* Bonus offered by the casino */,
  "highlights" TEXT /* Highlights of the casino */,
  "min_deposit" TEXT /* Minimum deposit required to claim the bonus */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review of the casino */,
  "trustworthiness" REAL /* Trustworthiness score of the casino */,
  "payout_rate" REAL /* Average payout rate of the casino */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the casino's website */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the casino */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("casino_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bonuses" (
  "bonus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bonus */,
  "bonus_name" TEXT /* Name of the bonus */,
  "bonus_type" TEXT /* Type of the bonus (e.g., welcome, no-deposit, cashback) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the bonus */,
  "terms_and_conditions" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the bonus */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the bonus */,
  "casino_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the casinos table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bonus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of the promotion (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the promotion */,
  "casino_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the casinos table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., login, game play, bonus claim) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casino_administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin */,
  "casino_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the casinos table */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the admin */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the admin */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin (e.g., casino admin, super admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the admin account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the admin's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platform_administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the admin */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the admin */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin (e.g., platform admin, super admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the admin account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the admin's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casino_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
